children.heading: Advisory Council
children.label: 1 Advisory Council
children.text: The term “Advisory Council” means the National Advisory Council on Healthcare Research and Quality established under .section 299c of this title

children.heading: Agency
children.label: 2 Agency
children.text: The term “Agency” means the Agency for Healthcare Research and Quality.

children.heading: Director
children.label: 3 Director
children.text: The term “Director” means the Director of the Agency for Healthcare Research and Quality.
